intelligenceLayer.summary: Oracle is learning from ψ and opportunity artifacts. Top money radar: AI Inquiry and Quote Copilot for Tour Operators (95/100).

todayLearnings.title: 2026-05-06 — Cron self-learning guardrail
todayLearnings.insight: Broad autonomous prompts can hit Hermes max tool-call RuntimeError. Bounded loops with strict tool-call budgets survive better.
todayLearnings.whyItMatters: Mike wants autonomous intelligence, but reliability matters more than long uncontrolled runs.
todayLearnings.nextAction: Continue appending learning entries here and later turn repeated patterns into dashboard widgets or scheduled reports.

todayLearnings.title: 2026-05-06 — Improvement loop needs a cleanliness sensor

todayLearnings.whyItMatters: Mike wants Moshe to act like a business/coding partner. If Oracle sees git noise, recent deploy history, and autonomous cron activity together, it can prevent accidental shipping o…

opportunityRadar.title: AI Inquiry and Quote Copilot for Tour Operators
opportunityRadar.thesis: AI assistant that reads WhatsApp/LINE/email inquiries, asks missing questions, creates trip options, estimates price, drafts Thai/English replies, and schedules follow-up.
opportunityRadar.pricing: 12,000–35,000 THB setup + 3,000–12,000 THB/month support, depending on volume and integrations.
opportunityRadar.validationStep: Create 5 realistic inquiry examples from Wiro patterns; show before/after response drafts and quote generation; ask operators if they would pay for a pilot.

opportunityRadar.title: Wiro Internal Booking/Itinerary OS → Micro-SaaS
opportunityRadar.thesis: Lightweight operating system for bookings: inquiry capture, customer profile, itinerary builder, quote calculator, deposit/payment status, prep checklist, guide notes, follow-up reminders.
opportunityRadar.pricing: 2,500–9,000 THB/month SaaS or 25,000–75,000 THB setup + monthly maintenance.
opportunityRadar.validationStep: Build only the Wiro version first. Then show screens to 10 similar operators and ask which part they would pay for.

opportunityRadar.title: Review/Reputation Autopilot for Tours and Local Services
opportunityRadar.thesis: Automated review request system: post-service messages, Google/Tripadvisor review links, negative-feedback interception, testimonials, owner reply drafts, monthly reputation report.
opportunityRadar.validationStep: Mock one monthly report and 3 message flows. Offer a manual pilot using Google Sheets plus scheduled messages.

opportunityRadar.title: WhatsApp/LINE Follow-up and No-show Reducer
opportunityRadar.thesis: Simple reminder and follow-up automations for inquiries, deposits, trip prep, pickup time, review requests, and abandoned conversations.
opportunityRadar.validationStep: Ask businesses to count last month’s unanswered inquiries/no-shows; show ROI from recovering 1 booking.

opportunityRadar.title: AI Trip Planner Lead Magnet for Chiang Mai/North Thailand
opportunityRadar.thesis: Public-facing AI trip planner that recommends routes, seasons, durations, packing lists, and Wiro-relevant experiences; captures leads for Wiro or partner tours.
opportunityRadar.pricing: Internal lead value first; if white-labeled, 2,000–8,000 THB/month.
opportunityRadar.validationStep: Create landing page with itinerary quiz and manual AI-generated itinerary delivery. Track opt-ins and Wiro inquiries.

autonomyRouter.summary: Phase 4 is active: Oracle classifies every recommendation before action and keeps execution behind safe/draft/approval lanes.

lanes.label: safe_now
lanes.summary: Moshe can execute without interrupting Mike only when work is read-only, reversible, internal, or safe draft-generation with no external side effect.

lanes.label: draft_only
lanes.summary: Moshe may prepare assets but must stop before publish/send/spend/deploy/contact.
blockedWork: commit/push/deploy public workflow changes without Mike approval

lanes.label: approval_required
lanes.summary: Mike approval is required before anything customer-facing, public, paid, destructive, cleanup/delete, commit/push, deploy, or outbound.

decisions.title: Build internal Wiro-style demo pack

decisions.nextSafeStep: Draft the demo pack locally in outbox with synthetic examples only.
decisions.approvalTrigger: No approval needed if the action stays read-only, internal, reversible, and secret-safe.

guardrails: Never send customer-facing messages without Mike approval.
Never spend money, subscribe, or publish publicly without Mike approval.
Never delete/cleanup unknown files or force push.
Never expose secrets; show configured/missing only.
Commit/push/deploy only when Mike explicitly approves that scope.
phase5Requirements: Signal Quality / Feedback Ledger records whether proactive outputs are useful or noisy.
Deployment Freshness Gap sensor compares live production, git HEAD, and local snapshot age.
Repo Hygiene / Ship Readiness sensor blocks mixed dirty worktrees from deploy recommendations.
Evidence Chain extractor turns build/test/smoke/deploy proof into reusable safety facts.
Safe Executor only runs allowlisted safe_now actions with audit logs and rollback notes.

terminal.note: Terminal panel is visible but execution is disabled until ORACLE_TERMINAL_ENABLED=true is set on a trusted runtime.

nextActions: Set ORACLE_SESSION_SECRET to arm the Mike-only signed session gate.
The Oracle now turns audit trail events into learnings before refreshing live data.
Keep the browser read-only until a valid session cookie unlocks execute mode.
Add execution handlers for GitHub and Vercel only after the audit trail is proven.
Use the Intelligence Layer panels to turn learnings into money radar and approval-ready actions.
Enable ORACLE_TERMINAL_ENABLED=true only on Mike local/admin runtime before using the Terminal tab.
